{"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_phone"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","package_tier"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","base_price"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","total_price"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_PkgInquiry_f3d83db7","email":"inquiry@example.com","phone":"+971501234567","property_type":"villa","budget_range":"200000-500000","message":"Package inquiry test"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
